requirement_topic.en: SUSMP / Poisons Standard Screening for Cosmetic Ingredients
requirement_topic.zh: 化妆品成分的SUSMP／《Poisons Standard》筛查
requirement_topic.zht: 化妝品成分的SUSMP／《Poisons Standard》篩查

summary.en: Cosmetic ingredients may be affected by the Standard for the Uniform Scheduling of Medicines and Poisons, commonly called the Poisons Standard or SUSMP. Scheduled substances can trigger concentration limits, warning statements, packaging controls, supply restrictions, or state and territory poisons-law obligations even when the finished product is marketed as a cosmetic.
summary.zh: 化妆品成分可能受《药品与毒物统一列管标准》（通常称为《Poisons Standard》或SUSMP）影响。列管物质即使存在于作为化妆品销售的成品中，也可能触发浓度限值、警示语、包装控制、供应限制或州和领地毒物法规义务。
summary.zht: 化妝品成分可能受《藥品與毒物統一列管標準》（通常稱為《Poisons Standard》或SUSMP）影響。列管物質即使存在於作為化妝品銷售的成品中，也可能觸發濃度限值、警示語、包裝控制、供應限制或州和領地毒物法規義務。

standards_or_laws: Therapeutic Goods (Poisons Standard) Instrument — current Poisons Standard / SUSMP
State and territory poisons legislation adopting or applying SUSMP schedules

summary.en: China controls prohibited and restricted cosmetic ingredients through NMPA lists, technical safety specifications, and product safety assessment. Those lists do not replace Australian poisons scheduling, which may classify the same chemical differently and may impose supply-chain controls outside cosmetic labelling rules.
summary.zh: 中国通过NMPA禁限用清单、技术安全规范及产品安全评估控制化妆品原料。这些清单不能替代澳大利亚毒物列管；同一化学品在澳大利亚可能被不同列管，并可能产生超出化妆品标签规则的供应链控制。
summary.zht: 中國通過NMPA禁限用清單、技術安全規範及產品安全評估控制化妝品原料。這些清單不能替代澳洲毒物列管；同一化學品在澳洲可能被不同列管，並可能產生超出化妝品標籤規則的供應鏈控制。

standards_or_laws: Safety and Technical Standards for Cosmetics — prohibited and restricted substances
CSAR 2021 — cosmetic safety assessment and ingredient compliance obligations

gap.en: Before export, screen active-like ingredients, preservatives, acids, hair dyes, depilatories, anti-dandruff agents, solvents, and high-concentration botanicals against the current Poisons Standard and relevant state or territory rules. A substance permitted in China at a cosmetic concentration may still need Australian warning, packaging, scheduling, or supply controls.
gap.zh: 出口前，应将类似活性成分、防腐剂、酸类、染发剂、脱毛剂、去屑剂、溶剂及高浓度植物成分按现行《Poisons Standard》及相关州或领地规则进行筛查。某物质即使在中国允许按化妆品浓度使用，在澳大利亚仍可能需要警示语、包装、列管或供应控制。
gap.zht: 出口前，應將類似活性成分、防腐劑、酸類、染髮劑、脫毛劑、去屑劑、溶劑及高濃度植物成分按現行《Poisons Standard》及相關州或領地規則進行篩查。某物質即使在中國允許按化妝品濃度使用，在澳洲仍可能需要警示語、包裝、列管或供應控制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a cosmetic ingredient is scheduled or otherwise controlled under the current Poisons Standard and applicable state or territory law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CN prohibited and restricted ingredient controls apply, but they do not satisfy Australian SUSMP screening

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Include SUSMP screening in the ingredient review; Australian poisons controls can apply alongside AICIS, ACCC labelling, and TGA boundary analysis.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应将SUSMP筛查纳入成分审查；澳大利亚毒物控制可与AICIS、ACCC标签及TGA边界分析并行适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應將SUSMP篩查納入成分審查；澳洲毒物控制可與AICIS、ACCC標籤及TGA邊界分析並行適用。

source.publisher: Federal Register of Legislation / Office of Parliamentary Counsel
